clinic.name: Apollo Heart Clinic
clinic.tagline: A Centre of Excellence in Cardiac Care
clinic.address: 4th Floor, Apollo Medical Tower, Bandra West, Mumbai – 400050

hero.subtitle: World-class interventional cardiology delivered with compassion. Trusted by 15,000+ patients across India.

about.heading: A Legacy of Cardiac Excellence
paragraphs: Dr. Arjun Mehta is one of India's most distinguished interventional cardiologists, renowned for his pioneering work in complex coronary interventions and structural heart disease. With over two decades of dedicated practice, he has transformed the lives of more than 15,000 patients across the country.

Trained at AIIMS New Delhi and further fellowship-trained at the Cleveland Clinic, USA, Dr. Mehta brings a rare combination of global expertise and compassionate patient care. He specialises in minimally invasive cardiac procedures, drastically reducing recovery times and improving outcomes.

A Fellow of the American College of Cardiology (FACC) and the Cardiological Society of India, Dr. Mehta also serves as a visiting consultant at several leading hospitals and has been recognised as one of India's Top 10 Cardiologists by Health Today magazine.

highlights.title: Education
highlights.desc: AIIMS New Delhi + Cleveland Clinic Fellowship

services.heading: Specialised Cardiac Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive heart care powered by cutting-edge technology and decades of expertise.

list.title: Coronary Angioplasty
list.description: Advanced balloon angioplasty and stenting procedures to restore blood flow in blocked coronary arteries with precision and care.

list.title: Echocardiography
list.description: High-resolution cardiac imaging to evaluate heart structure, function, and detect abnormalities using 3D and 4D echo technology.

list.title: Pacemaker Implantation
list.description: Implantation of permanent and temporary pacemakers for rhythm management, including biventricular pacing for heart failure.

list.title: Cardiac Stress Testing
list.description: Treadmill tests (TMT), nuclear stress testing and pharmacological stress testing to evaluate heart performance under exertion.

list.title: Heart Failure Management
list.description: Comprehensive, multidisciplinary care for acute and chronic heart failure, including device therapy and optimised medical management.

list.title: Cardiac CT & MRI
list.description: Non-invasive coronary CT angiography and cardiac MRI for detailed anatomical and functional assessment of the heart and vessels.

testimonials.heading: Patient Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of families trust Dr. Mehta with their most precious asset — their heart.

list.name: Ramesh Kapoor
list.text: I was rushed to the hospital with a major heart attack. Dr. Mehta performed emergency angioplasty and saved my life. His expertise and calm demeanour gave my entire family hope. I owe my second chance to him.

list.name: Sunita Verma
list.text: After being misdiagnosed for two years, Dr. Mehta correctly identified my condition within the first consultation. His thorough approach and detailed explanation made me feel truly cared for. Exceptional doctor!

list.name: Anil Sharma
list.text: The pacemaker implantation went perfectly. Dr. Mehta and his team were professional throughout. I'm now back to my morning walks and feel 20 years younger. Cannot thank him enough for this new lease on life.

list.name: Priya Nair
list.text: As someone with a family history of heart disease, I was anxious about my check-up. Dr. Mehta was incredibly patient and reassuring, explaining everything clearly. His preventive approach has given me true peace of mind.

videos.heading: Inside Our Clinic
videos.subtitle: A glimpse into the world-class facilities and environment where your heart is in safe hands.

items.title: State-of-the-Art Cath Lab
items.description: Our fully digital catheterisation laboratory equipped with the latest imaging systems.

items.title: Advanced Cardiac ICU
items.description: 24/7 monitoring with a dedicated team of cardiologists and cardiac nurses.

items.title: Consultation & Diagnostics
items.description: Personalised consultations with the latest 3D echocardiography and cardiac CT.

items.title: Cardiac Rehabilitation
items.description: Structured recovery programmes to help patients regain strength and confidence.
